prs_created.title: feat: add base64 and rand module bindings and tests
prs_created.description: Added Fable.Beam.Base64 (encode, decode, mime_decode via ImportAll + tryDecode, tryMimeDecode Emit wrappers, 11 tests) and Fable.Beam.Rand (uniform, uniform(n), uniform_real, bytes, normal(), normal(mean,var) via ImportAll, 8 tests). Patch in run 24647598905.

prs_created.title: chore: add NuGet and rebar3 dependency caching to CI
prs_created.description: Push rejected (workflows permission). Patch in issue #67 for manual application.

notes: Open issues: #67 (CI caching info), #62 (monthly summary). No user-filed issues. String bindings merged as PR #71. Queue bindings merged as PR #73. Release PR #72 open (5.0.0-rc.25). CI caching patch still needs manual application (#67). Base64+rand bindings patch in run 24647598905.
